projectDescription: A local REST API server that mimics the Upstash Redis REST API, enabling unlimited local development and testing without cloud rate limits.
keyFeatures: Upstash REST API compatibility — drop-in replacement for @upstash/redis SDK
Unlimited local requests with no cloud rate limits or daily quotas
Pub/Sub and live monitor via Server-Sent Events
Web dashboard showing requests, cloud quota saved, and key browser
Rate-limit simulator to test fallback logic against cloud quota/RPS limits
Read-only token support mirroring Upstash cloud behavior
Docker Compose profiles: default bundled Redis, external Redis, Redis Stack
CLI tool (upstash-local) for profile switching, seeding, export, and import
Security hardening: localhost-only binding, dangerous command blocking, CORS control
Tiny ~10MB Docker image with connection pooling
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /<COMMAND>/[args...] — single command via URL path segments
POST / — single command via JSON body ["CMD", arg1, arg2, ...]
GET /subscribe/<channel> — SSE stream for Pub/Sub subscription
GET /monitor — SSE stream of live Redis monitor output
upstash-local use dev|cloud — switch environment profile
upstash-local seed --keys N --prefix P — populate test data
